alerts.title: Temperature Critical High
alerts.description: Temperature exceeded critical maximum threshold
alerts.recommended_action: Activate cooling system immediately, check ventilation

alerts.title: Temperature Critical Low
alerts.description: Temperature dropped below critical minimum threshold
alerts.recommended_action: Activate heating system immediately, check insulation

alerts.title: Humidity Level High
alerts.description: Humidity exceeded optimal range
alerts.recommended_action: Increase ventilation, check for water leaks

alerts.title: Humidity Level Low
alerts.description: Humidity below optimal range
alerts.recommended_action: Add moisture to environment, check water systems

alerts.title: Air Quality Critical
alerts.description: Dangerous levels of CO2 or NH3 detected
alerts.recommended_action: Increase ventilation immediately, evacuate if necessary

alerts.title: Ventilation System Failure
alerts.description: Ventilation fan or system malfunction detected
alerts.recommended_action: Check fan motors, activate backup ventilation

alerts.title: Feed Level Low
alerts.description: Feed supply below recommended threshold
alerts.recommended_action: Schedule feed delivery, check consumption patterns

alerts.title: Feed Level Critical
alerts.description: Feed supply critically low - immediate attention required
alerts.recommended_action: Emergency feed delivery required immediately

alerts.title: Feeder System Malfunction
alerts.description: Automated feeder mechanism failure detected
alerts.recommended_action: Check feeder motor and mechanisms, manual feeding if needed

alerts.title: Abnormal Feed Consumption
alerts.description: Feed consumption pattern outside normal range
alerts.recommended_action: Check bird health, investigate consumption patterns

alerts.title: Water Level Low
alerts.description: Water supply below recommended level
alerts.recommended_action: Check water supply, refill tanks

alerts.title: Water Level Critical
alerts.description: Water supply critically low - immediate action required
alerts.recommended_action: Emergency water supply needed immediately

alerts.title: Water Pressure Low
alerts.description: Water system pressure below optimal range
alerts.recommended_action: Check pumps and water lines for blockages

alerts.title: Water Leak Detected
alerts.description: Significant water leak detected in system
alerts.recommended_action: Locate and repair leak immediately, check water damage

alerts.title: Water Quality Alert
alerts.description: Water quality parameters outside safe range
alerts.recommended_action: Test water immediately, provide alternative water source

alerts.title: High Mortality Rate
alerts.description: Bird mortality rate exceeded normal threshold
alerts.recommended_action: Veterinary consultation required, isolate affected areas

alerts.title: Low Bird Activity
alerts.description: Unusual decrease in bird movement and activity
alerts.recommended_action: Check bird health, environmental conditions

alerts.title: Abnormal Weight Gain Pattern
alerts.description: Bird weight gain outside expected range
alerts.recommended_action: Review feeding program, check bird health

alerts.title: Suspected Disease Outbreak
alerts.description: Multiple health indicators suggest disease outbreak
alerts.recommended_action: Immediate veterinary consultation, quarantine procedures

alerts.title: Unauthorized Access Detected
alerts.description: Unauthorized entry to restricted farm areas
alerts.recommended_action: Check security cameras, verify personnel access

alerts.title: Predator Activity Detected
alerts.description: Motion sensors detected potential predator activity
alerts.recommended_action: Activate deterrent systems, check perimeter security

alerts.title: Fire/Smoke Detection
alerts.description: Smoke or fire detected in facility
alerts.recommended_action: Evacuate immediately, contact emergency services

alerts.title: Power System Failure
alerts.description: Main power supply interruption detected
alerts.recommended_action: Check backup generators, ensure critical systems operational

alerts.title: Equipment Malfunction
alerts.description: General equipment malfunction detected
alerts.recommended_action: Inspect equipment, schedule maintenance

alerts.title: Sensor Communication Lost
alerts.description: One or more sensors not responding
alerts.recommended_action: Check sensor connections and power supply

alerts.title: Scheduled Maintenance Due
alerts.description: Routine maintenance schedule reminder
alerts.recommended_action: Schedule maintenance appointment

alerts.title: Backup Battery Low
alerts.description: Backup battery power below threshold
alerts.recommended_action: Replace or charge backup batteries

alerts.title: System Reboot Required
alerts.description: System requires restart for updates
alerts.recommended_action: Schedule system restart during low-activity period
